body: ### Option 1. `Field.Item` ```jsx ``` This would allow using label and description checkboxes/radios in groups without restricting the exact structure of those components and make it easier to style Implicit labels would still work the same, except it would have an additional wrapper: ```jsx ``` It could support `render={null}` and not render any element (like `CollapsibleRoot`) since it's main purpose is to hold the label/description context ### Option 2. Move `Label` & `Description` parts from `Field` to the label-able component `Field.Item` is still needed, but the only use-case is to label individual checkboxes/radios within a group (regardless of whether the group is wrapped in `Field.Root` or not) --- ### Examples in other libraries - [Shadcn](https://ui.shadcn.com/docs/components/radio-group#form) has a nest-able `FormItem` that wraps around each control in the group, enclosing a `FormLabel` - RA uses their `"slot"` API to let you [label the whole group](https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/react-aria/CheckboxGroup.html#description), you need to set up `aria-describedby` [manually](https://react-spectrum.adobe.com/react-aria/CheckboxGroup.html#contexts) to label and/or describe each control --- ### UI Examples Examples of different arrangements of checkbox/radio + label/description
title: [field][checkbox][radio group] Enable label and description on individual controls
